steps.description: Retrieve the declared papers without accessing sources outside the clean-room allowlist.
steps.pass_criterion: Every accessed source has a stable id present in allowed_source_ids.
steps.notes: Example only; no clinical-performance claim is implied.

steps.description: Extract independently checkable atomic facts from the allowed papers.
steps.pass_criterion: Each retained fact links to at least one allowed source id.
steps.notes: Unsupported and contradictory facts are excluded from the publishable synthesis.

steps.description: Produce the final synthesis from verified atomic facts only.
steps.pass_criterion: Atomic-fact precision and recall meet the declared floors with zero contradictions.
steps.notes: The fixture demonstrates the contract, not benchmark performance.

notes: Dependency-free JSON example for a literature-synthesis evaluation run.
